summary: Per-account Google Calendar, upcoming events bar, and reliable meeting alerts.

introduced: Per-account Google Calendar with account tabs and an embedded week view for web sign-in accounts
Upcoming events bar at the top of the app — see your next meetings from any workspace
Meeting alerts at 10 minutes, 1 minute, and when the meeting starts, scheduled through macOS notifications
Web Gmail notifications and dock badge for accounts signed in through the browser
changed: Calendar sync now works for web sign-in accounts via session cookies, not just OAuth
Passkey-friendly Gmail web sign-in with isolated cookie stores per account
removed: Notes removed from the sidebar workspace menu
